hawkish_phrases: further gradual increases in the target range for the federal funds rate will be consistent with sustained expansion
A few participants expected that policy would need to become modestly restrictive for a time
a number judged that it would be necessary to temporarily raise the federal funds rate above their assessments of its longer-run level
inflation may modestly exceed 2 percent for a period of time
remove the language stating that 'the stance of monetary policy remains accommodative'
dovish_phrases: risks to the economic outlook appear roughly balanced
wage growth remained moderate by historical standards
some measures of trend inflation or longer-term inflation expectations were below levels consistent with the 2 percent objective
balance the risk of tightening monetary policy too quickly
indicators of longer-term inflation expectations are little changed, on balance
summary: The FOMC unanimously raised the target range by 25bp to 2.00-2.25% and removed the phrase 'the stance of monetary policy remains accommodative,' signaling continued gradual tightening with several participants expecting rates to rise above neutral levels to prevent inflation overshooting.
